name: pape-superpowers
description: Personal fork of obra/superpowers split into per-axis Claude Code plugins so users can install only the skills they need (foundation, TDD, debugging, planning, code review, etc.) instead of the full bundle. Install the `superpowers` umbrella for the complete set.

plugins.name: superpowers-foundation
plugins.description: Foundation: using-superpowers bootstrap + brainstorming. Required by every other axis plugin.

plugins.name: superpowers-verification
plugins.description: Verification before completion. Depends on superpowers-foundation.

plugins.name: superpowers-code-review
plugins.description: Requesting and receiving code review. Depends on superpowers-foundation.

plugins.name: superpowers-finishing-branch
plugins.description: Finishing a development branch. Depends on superpowers-foundation.

plugins.name: superpowers-worktrees
plugins.description: Using git worktrees. Depends on superpowers-foundation.

plugins.name: superpowers-subagents
plugins.description: Subagent-driven development and dispatching parallel agents. Depends on superpowers-foundation.

plugins.name: superpowers-plans
plugins.description: Writing and executing implementation plans. Depends on superpowers-foundation.

plugins.name: superpowers-writing-skills
plugins.description: Writing skills (the meta skill). Depends on superpowers-foundation.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Umbrella plugin: depends on every superpowers axis plugin. Install for the full skill set; install per-axis plugins instead for narrower scope.
